document_name: Lehman Brothers Final Emergency Liquidity Assessment and Bankruptcy Contingency Planning

document_sentence_array.text: The investment banking sector has experienced unprecedented volatility this year, following the rescue of Bear Stearns in March.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: Confidential minutes from the Federal Reserve Bank of New York confirm that Barclays has officially withdrawn its bid for Lehman Brothers due to a lack of UK government guarantees.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: Lehman Brothers was founded in 1850 and has historically been a dominant force in the global fixed-income and mortgage markets.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: Risk managers are concerned that the firm's heavy exposure to commercial real estate assets cannot be hedged effectively in the current market.
document_sentence_array.label: Low

document_sentence_array.text: A secret internal liquidation report suggests that a Chapter 11 filing is now the only viable option to prevent an uncontrolled run on the firm's remaining assets.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: Market participants are closely watching the credit default swap spreads for all major Wall Street institutions this weekend.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: Internal correspondence reveals that the U.S. Treasury has explicitly stated that no federal taxpayer money will be used to bail out the firm.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: General discussions among the consortium of 10 banks involve the creation of a $70 billion 'liquidity pool' to help markets function if a major peer fails.
document_sentence_array.label: Low

document_sentence_array.text: A confidential draft of the bankruptcy petition lists total liabilities of $613 billion against assets of $639 billion, most of which are currently illiquid.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: The Dow Jones Industrial Average has seen several triple-digit swings this month as investor confidence remains fragile.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: Secret memos from the Prime Brokerage division show that hedge fund clients have successfully pulled $50 billion in capital from the firm in the last 72 hours.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: Compliance is tracking all outbound communications from senior managing directors to ensure that no selective disclosure of the filing occurs before midnight.
document_sentence_array.label: Low

document_sentence_array.text: Lehman Brothers operates major offices in London, Tokyo, and Hong Kong, necessitating a coordinated global response for its operations.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: The unannounced decision by Bank of America to acquire Merrill Lynch instead of Lehman has effectively removed the last potential 'White Knight' from the table.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: Our research analysts are evaluating the potential for 'contagion' across the money market fund industry if Lehman's commercial paper defaults.
document_sentence_array.label: Low

document_sentence_array.text: Standard banking procedures require all traders to remain on-call through the weekend during periods of significant market stress.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: Finalized board resolutions indicate that the firm will file for bankruptcy in the Southern District of New York at approximately 12:01 AM Monday.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: Institutional clients are increasingly demanding more collateral for repo transactions as the firm's credit rating remains under review.
document_sentence_array.label: Low

document_sentence_array.text: The Securities and Exchange Commission is working with the New York Fed to oversee the orderly wind-down of the firm's derivatives book.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: Internal correspondence indicates that employees have been instructed to secure all confidential files and prepare for immediate office lockout tomorrow.
document_sentence_array.label: High
